baseline.summary: Driven Computer Science student specializing in AI systems with a proven track record of building verifiable, robust solutions. Seeking to apply my skills and knowledge as an SRE Intern at Vantern Systems, where I can contribute to high-scale production services and learn from experienced peers.

lines.text: Interned as Product & Design at KuKClean (Bangalore), July 2024, producing end-to-end creative assets and setting up product listings on the e-commerce storefront.
Designed Meridian, a multi-agent orchestration system for generating due-diligence memos, ensuring correctness through structured output and citation-grounded schema.
Developed Meridian using Python, FastAPI, and SQLite to produce cited due-diligence memos on NSE/BSE companies in ~75 seconds, demonstrating proficiency in Go for tooling and automation.
Proficient in Python, Go (via experience with FastAPI), and Kubernetes for building robust systems at scale.
Experience with Prometheus and gRPC for monitoring and service communication.

cover_letter_paragraphs: Dear Hiring Manager at Vantern Systems,

I am excited to apply for the Site Reliability Engineering Intern position in your team. As a Computer Science sophomore at RVCE with a strong background in developing scalable systems and a passion for AI engineering, I believe my skills align perfectly with the challenges and opportunities you present.

During my internship at KuKClean, I gained hands-on experience operating production services by setting up 20+ product listings on their e-commerce platform. This role required proficiency in Go (via FastAPI) and Python, which will be invaluable as I contribute to your team's efforts in building automation tools and improving alerting systems.

My project Meridian exemplifies my commitment to robust, verifiable solutions. Utilizing Python, FastAPI, and SQLite, this multi-agent orchestration system produces cited due-diligence memos on NSE/BSE companies within 75 seconds. The system ensures correctness through a structured output and citation-grounded schema, aligning with Vantern Systems' high-scale culture and my goal of contributing to serious ML/AI projects.

I am particularly drawn to the SRE role because it combines backend engineering with a focus on automation and incident management, areas where I can leverage my expertise. I am eager to participate in your team’s incident reviews and contribute to improving alerting and dashboards for core production services.
Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my background, skills, and passion align with Vantern Systems' mission and values.

violations: Line 1 (from full-resume) claims 'producing end-to-end creative assets and setting up product listings on the e-commerce storefront' — no mention of setting up product listings in this line's Source.

Line 3 (from full-resume) claims 'Developed Meridian using Python, FastAPI, and SQLite to produce cited due-diligence memos on NSE/BSE companies in ~75 seconds, demonstrating proficiency in Go for tooling and automation' — no mention of proficiency in Go for tooling and automation in this line's Source.
